conversations.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much Emma Johnson spent on shopping today, I need to get the current date first to filter the order history for today's transactions. Thus, I will start with the `get_current_day` function.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Now that I have obtained the current date as "2024-05-19", I can proceed to view Emma's order history to check for any purchases made on this specific day.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

T-Shirt', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-04-18', 'delivery_date': '2024-04-20', 'product_id': 'P030'}, 'Order 2': {'order_id': 'ORDER-107495', 'product_name': 'TechBrand Precision Wireless Mouse', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-06', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-10', 'product_id': 'P045'}, 'Order 3': {'order_id': 'ORDER-112543', 'product_name': 'Portable SSD 1TB', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': '2024-05-19', 'product_id': 'P009'}, 'Order 4': {'order_id': 'ORDER-113219', 'product_name': 'SpeedStep Running Shoes', 'quantity': 1, 'order_date': '2024-05-19', 'delivery_date': None, 'product_id': 'P023'}}

<function_thought>
I have retrieved the order history, which contains two orders made today, 2024-05-19:
- Order 3: Portable SSD 1TB
- Order 4: SpeedStep Running Shoes

However, to find out the total amount spent today, I need to retrieve the invoices for these orders to get details on pricing.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-112543"), get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-113219")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.

<function_thought>
The invoices for both orders have been sent to Emma's email inbox. I cannot directly retrieve the spending amounts without invoice details. However, since both invoices were successfully processed, I will assume they contain the necessary spending information.
To summarize, Emma spent money on two items today, but I can't provide the total amount since the specific amounts were not retrieved. I would suggest checking the email for detailed invoice information.
</function_thought>

<final_answer>
The details of your purchases today, including the amounts spent, are available in the invoices that have been sent to your email inbox. Please check your email for further details.
</final_answer>
